meta.title: Dueydo: Private Secure Chat for Friends
meta.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging with Signal Protocol. Built for friends who value privacy, security, and real conversation. Coming soon.
meta.ogImageAlt: Dueydo — Private secure chat for friends

fortified.title: Fortified
fortified.description: Signal Protocol encryption. Your words are yours alone.

ephemeral.title: Ephemeral
ephemeral.description: Messages vanish after two weeks. No archives, no traces.

sovereign.title: Sovereign
sovereign.description: EU infrastructure. Zero-knowledge server. Your data stays yours.

features.sectionSubtitle: Security shouldn't mean settling for less. Rich features, zero compromise.

threads.title: Threads
threads.description: Reply to any message to start a focused side conversation. The main chat stays clean while you dive deep into any topic.

posts.title: Posts
posts.description: Share ideas worth keeping. Long-form posts with rich formatting live alongside your chat — they don't vanish like messages do.

duressPin.title: Duress PIN
duressPin.description: A second PIN that silently shows fake conversations if you're ever forced to unlock. Your real messages stay hidden. Recover everything when you're safe.

encryptedMedia.title: Encrypted Media
encryptedMedia.description: Share photos, videos, and documents with the same Signal-level encryption as your messages. Everything auto-deletes after two weeks.

screenshots.sectionSubtitle: Light mode or dark mode. Your conversations, your way.
screenshots.postDetailLightAlt: Dueydo post detail in light mode
screenshots.postDetailDarkAlt: Dueydo post detail in dark mode

closing.quote: "Even the monks who brewed the finest ales<br class="hidden md:inline"/>needed walls to keep their conversations safe."

schema.appDescription: Private secure chat for friends. End-to-end encrypted messaging with Signal Protocol, auto-deleting messages, threads, and posts.
schema.orgDescription: dizyx builds privacy-first software with EU infrastructure. Boutique AI consultancy specializing in agentic workflows and secure communications.
schema.websiteDescription: End-to-end encrypted messaging with Signal Protocol. Built for friends who value privacy, security, and real conversation.
